# Hello, Grobase

Grobase is one backend for everything you build: accounts, database, realtime,
files, search and functions over any database engine — self-hosted, open-source,
and honestly priced.

## One codebase, no rewrite

Most stacks force a rewrite when you outgrow them. Grobase does not. The same
codebase runs as a **5 MB single binary** for a prototype and as a multi-tenant
platform for thousands of customers. You graduate between tiers; you never
migrate off the platform.

## Measured, not claimed

Every performance and cost figure on this site is measured on the real stack and
reproducible — RAM is benchmarked live, and prices are public rate-card
arithmetic. If we can't measure it, we don't claim it.

## What's next

Read the [introduction](/docs/getting-started/introduction/) to see how the
pieces fit, or jump straight to the [pricing](/pricing/) to find the tier that
matches what you're building.
